SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Interface FunctionalOperationContract

All Superinterfaces:
Contract, OperationContract, SpecificationElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
FunctionalOperationContractImpl
public interface FunctionalOperationContract extends OperationContract
A contract about an operation (i.e., a method or a constructor), consisting of a precondition, a postcondition, a modifiable clause, a measured-by clause, and a modality.

  • Nested Class Summary

    • map

      FunctionalOperationContract map(UnaryOperator<JTerm> op, Services services)
      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
      Specified by:
      map in interface Contract
      Specified by:
      map in interface OperationContract
      Specified by:
      map in interface SpecificationElement
      Parameters:
      op - the operator to apply.
      services - services.

      this specification element with the operator applied.

    • getPost

      JTerm getPost(LocationVariable heap, LocationVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> paramVars, LocationVariable resultVar, LocationVariable excVar, Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> atPreVars, Services services)
      Returns the postcondition of the contract.
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap variable.
      selfVar - the self variable.
      paramVars - the list of parameter variables.
      resultVar - the result variable.
      excVar - the exception variable.
      atPreVars - the map of old variables.
      services - the services object.
      Returns:
      the post condition.

    • getPost

      JTerm getPost(List<LocationVariable> heapContext, LocationVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> paramVars, LocationVariable resultVar, LocationVariable excVar, Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> atPreVars, Services services)

    • getPost

      JTerm getPost(LocationVariable heap, JTerm heapTerm, JTerm selfTerm, ImmutableList<JTerm> paramTerms, JTerm resultTerm, JTerm excTerm, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> atPres, Services services)
      Returns the postcondition of the contract.
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap variable.
      heapTerm - the heap variable term.
      selfTerm - the self variable term.
      paramTerms - the list of parameter variable terms.
      resultTerm - the result variable term.
      excTerm - the exception variable term.
      atPres - the map of old variable terms.
      services - the services object.
      Returns:
      the postcondition.
